summary: Backend testing complete for iteration 28: Rich Info Banner (Panel) with new fields and TV/Radio CRUD enrichment. All 19 tests passed. Verified all new info banner fields (title, subtitle, badge, image_url, tags, link2_url/link2_label, footer_text), content guard logic, version auto-increment, and TV/radio rich field persistence.

minor.issue: Version resets to 1 when saving same content without explicit version parameter (Pydantic model defaults version=1). Should preserve previous version when content unchanged.

passed_tests: PUT /api/admin/info-banner accepts all new rich fields: title, subtitle, badge, message, variant, image_url, tags (list), link_url, link_label, link2_url, link2_label, footer_text, dismissible, enabled
GET /api/info-banner returns {banner: null} when enabled=true but NO title/subtitle/message/image_url provided (empty content guard)
GET /api/info-banner returns banner when enabled=true and only image_url provided (image is visible content)
GET /api/info-banner returns banner when enabled=true and title provided
GET /api/info-banner returns banner when enabled=true and message provided
Version auto-increments when enabled flips from false to true
Version preserved when saving same content with explicit version parameter
GET /api/admin/info-banner returns config even when enabled=false (admin can see disabled config)
GET /api/admin/info-banner returns config even when empty content (admin can see empty config)
PUT /api/admin/tv-channels/{id} accepts description, country, stream_url, quality, logo_url, is_active fields
PUT /api/admin/radio-stations/{id} accepts description, country, frequency, stream_url, website_url, logo_url, genre, is_active fields
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: InfoBannerUpdate Pydantic model has version: Optional[int] = 1 default. When client doesn't send version, it defaults to 1 which may reset version unexpectedly. Consider using version: Optional[int] = None and handling None in backend logic.
seed_data_creation: Test TV channel and radio station created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 backend features validated: (1) Info banner upgraded to rich panel with new fields: title, subtitle, badge, image_url, tags (array), link2_url/link2_label for secondary CTA, footer_text. All optional. Backend returns null banner if enabled but no visible content (title/subtitle/message/image_url). Version auto-bumps on content change or enabling. (2) TV channels CRUD at /api/admin/tv-channels accepts arbitrary fields via request.json() including description, country, stream_url, quality, logo_url, is_active. (3) Radio stations CRUD at /api/admin/radio-stations accepts description, country, frequency, stream_url, website_url, logo_url, genre, is_active. All admin endpoints require auth (401) and admin role (403).
